name: supermemory_recall
desc: Search persistent memory for relevant information. Use this when the user asks about something they may have mentioned before, or when you need context from previous sessions.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: What to search for in memory

parameters.name: container_tag
parameters.description: Memory scope — defaults to user ID

parameters.name: search_mode
parameters.description: Search strategy: hybrid (default), semantic, or keyword
